final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with a lower estimated risk in this dataset, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that savings account balance is minimal, because it is utilized to differentiate between high-risk and low-risk borrowers, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that checking account balance is negative, because it exhibits a substantially higher estimated risk relative to the reference group, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 모델 또한 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
저축 잔액이 적음은 고위험과 저위험 대출자를 구분하는 지표로 알려져 있으며, 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 인식합니다. [2]
계좌 잔액이 음수인 경우는 참조 그룹에 비해 훨씬 높은 위험을 나타내지만, 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다. [3]
전반적으로 이 고객은 낮은 신용 위험을 가질 것으로 평가됩니다.
